# Pull Request Template for Bug-Free Travel Guides

## Description
<!-- Teaser description of your contribution -->

## Changes
- [ ] New destination added
- [ ] Existing destination updated/corrected
- [ ] Supporting document (guide, template, calendar, etc.) added/updated
- [ ] Critical correction (bug data, seasonal update, safety warning)
- [ ] Community resource (newsletter, contributing guide, etc.)

## Verification
- [ ] At least 2 independent sources cited for any bug-safety claims
- [ ] Cross-referenced with [Research Updates](guides/research-updates.md) for known corrections
- [ ] Cross-referenced with [Seasonal Safety Calendar](guides/seasonal-safety-calendar.md) for conflicts
- [ ] Used [Submission Template](guides/submission-template.md) format (if new destination)
- [ ] Checked [Contributing Guide](guides/contributing.md) for standards and quality requirements

## Safety Notes
<!-- If changing safety claims, explain why the new information is reliable -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Read the [Welcome Guide](guides/00-welcome.md) critical corrections section
- [ ] Verified that no existing guide duplicates this contribution
- [ ] Followed [Quality Standards](guides/contributing.md) for destination verification
